message:
test(core): add fleet_pressure_tier serde roundtrip and backward compat tests (ft-dwjtm)

Add health_snapshot_fleet_pressure_tier_roundtrip test verifying the new
fleet_pressure_tier field serializes/deserializes correctly through JSON.
Add assertion to existing backward-compat test confirming missing field
defaults to None when deserializing old JSON payloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
